subject: AlgoVoi action_ref namespace v0 vectors

suite.name: action_ref_namespace_v0 JCS+SHA-256 cross-validation
suite.method: Recomputed SHA-256(JCS(preimage)) for each vector and compared to expected_action_ref

verification_scope: Byte-level JCS canonicalization and SHA-256 hash match. Crest independently recomputed each action_ref from the published preimage and confirmed byte-identical output.
notes: Cross-validation of AlgoVoi JCS corpus against Crest Python JCS implementation.
